nasb.text: It went down westward to the territory of the Japhletites, as far as the territory of lower Beth-horon even to Gezer, and it ended at the sea.

esv.text: Then it goes down westward to the territory of the Japhletites, as far as the territory of Lower Beth-horon, then to Gezer, and it ends at the sea.

cnv.text: 又向西下到押利提人的境界，去到下伯．和崙和基色的境界，直通到海。

ccb.text: 然后西下至押利提人的疆土，远至伯·和仑地区，经基色直到地中海。
